productDisplayName: Timex Men Silver Toned Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case, has a textured fixed bezelDial style: Silver toned dial with branding below the 12 hour mark, has silver toned hands with white inlay, has black markings, date and day displayFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap style: Black, leather strap with a tang claspWater resistantComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase
